summary: Hot matrix recording of a legendary late‑80s show with a soaring Dark Star, though the mix lets a screaming audience member dominate the opening.
review: The matrix source blends three audience feeds with a soundboard to give a hot, energetic feel that captures the legend of this late‑80s performance. Dark Star opens the set in an emotional way that moves listeners to tears, but one reviewer notes an overly loud girl screaming in the mix which can be distracting. Overall the show is praised as a classic, and the recording quality is good despite the occasional mixing quirk.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers love the performance and rate it highly; the matrix provides a strong, hot sound though a mix issue is noted, leading to an overall strong rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Generally hot and clear thanks to three audience feeds plus one soundboard; however the girl screaming at the start of Dark Star is mixed too high and can be distracting.

show_quality.setlist_flow: A legendary late‑80s set that builds great energy, especially with an emotional Dark Star opening; the performance flows well despite the lack of track numbers in this version.
